task_completion.description: Verify 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' is at the top of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' should be visible at the very top of the document, left-aligned, in bold, and all uppercase letters.

task_completion.description: Verify the headline is formatted correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Meridian Corp Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results' should be centered, bolded, and appear noticeably larger (16pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Verify the dateline is inserted at the start of the first body paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NEW YORK, NY – January 25, 2025 – ' must be bolded and placed at the very beginning of the first body paragraph, running directly into the subsequent non-bolded text on the same line.

task_completion.description: Verify the prose financial paragraph is replaced by a formatted table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table should be visible with columns 'Metric', 'Q4 2024', and 'FY 2024'. The rows should list 'Revenue', 'Operating Income', 'Net Income', and 'Diluted EPS'. The original prose paragraph starting with 'For the fourth quarter, Revenue was...' should no longer be present.

task_completion.description: Verify 'About Meridian Corp' is styled as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The section title 'About Meridian Corp' should be styled differently from normal text, matching standard 'Heading 2' formatting (typically bold, slightly larger, and possibly a different color like blue depending on the word processor theme).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Safe Harbor' paragraph is formatted in 9pt italics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph text under 'Safe Harbor / Forward-Looking Statements' should be entirely in italics and appear noticeably smaller (9pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Verify the '###' end mark is present and the document is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three hash marks '###' should be centered at the very end of the document. The word processor's title bar or a save dialog should show the file name 'Earnings_Release_Formatted.docx'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer or Microsoft Word) being used, rather than just a plain text editor or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the table is a genuine word processor table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The financial metrics should be in a real table with visible cell boundaries or gridlines, not just text aligned using spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually interacted with the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of text selection, cursor movement, or ribbon/menu interactions in the word processor, rather than a terminal window running a python-docx script to instantly format the file.
